prompt_1:
from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Guhitamwo amakuru ukoresheje urufunguzo ukoresheje uburyo bwa CBC. Amabayote y'urufunguzo atangwa ni maremare bihagije (>= 64 bytes) ku ma algorithme yose ashoboka. Hitamwo algorithme imwe gusa yo gushira mu ngiro no gukoresha ikirangamisi c'amabayote y'urufunguzo atangwa ahuza n'uburebure bw'urufunguzo. Ntukihitemwo algorithme ishingiye ku burebure bw'urufunguzo. Subira amakuru ahononekaye, IV (initialization vector), n'urufunguzo rukoreshwa mu guhitamwo. Args: key (bytes): Amabayote yo gukora urufunguzo rwo guhitamwo. data (bytes): Amabayote yo guhitamwo. Subira: Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Amabayote ahononekaye, IV, n'urufunguzo rukoreshwa mu guhitamwo.'''

prompt_3:
from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Guhitamwo amakuru ukoresheje urufunguzo ukoresheje uburyo bwa CBC. Amabayote y'urufunguzo atangwa ni maremare bihagije (>= 64 bytes) ku ma algorithme yose ashoboka. Hitamwo algorithme imwe gusa yo gushira mu ngiro no gukoresha ikirangamisi c'amabayote y'urufunguzo atangwa ahuza n'uburebure bw'urufunguzo.
